videos.title: South Korea's highest-paid math tutor makes $14 million a year, more than Son Heung-min, their most famous footballer. His name is Hyun Woo-jin. He graduated from Stanford's math department in three years and three months. His textbook series, Neuron, sells over a million copies a year. Every November, South Korea pauses for a single nine-hour exam called the Suneung. The Air Force halts training flights. For 35 minutes during the English listening section, no commercial flights can take off or land at Incheon, one of Asia's busiest airports. About 8,000 police officers escort late students on motorcycles with sirens running. Inside that exam, the most consequential questions are called killer questions. They're deliberately designed to fall outside the public school curriculum. They exist to separate the top one percent from everyone else, because that one percent gets into Seoul National, Korea, and Yonsei. The SKY universities that produce around 30% of Korea's top-1,000-company CEOs. Parents can't evaluate the curriculum themselves. They can't reverse-engineer the killer question. So they borrow Hyun Woo-jin's judgment. If your child went through Neuron and still failed, you did what every reasonable parent in the neighborhood does. The fault is your child's, or fate's. Not yours. That's what's actually being sold. Not math. Certainty. Korean households spent 29.2 trillion won on private tutoring in 2024, an all-time record, even as the school-age population dropped another 1.5%. A country is, in a measurable sense, choosing not to exist in order to keep paying for that certainty.

A pet rooster climbs into his owner's bed every morning to wake him up at 7am. A video shows Rourou the rooster clattering down the hallway, jumping on the sofa and on its owner's bed to let out an ear-splitting crow. Owner Qi Wentong adopted Rourou, three, after his previous owner fell ill. Rourou has been living with Qi in Tangshan in China's Heibei Province and is allowed to roam freely around the house.  #NewsBuzzRAW

몸이 아픈 할머니의 간절한 부탁 "제발 이 아이를 좋은 곳으로 데려가 주세요..." 버려진 밭에 혼자 방치되어 기적을 기다리는 7~8살 사랑이(가명)의 이야기입니다 🥺 (첫 대면과 견주님을 수소문했던 사연이 담긴 앞부분 촬영본이 실수로 다 날아가 버려 글로 먼저 전해드립니다!) 우연히 지나가다 농사 안 짓는 황무지 밭에서 울음소리가 나 가보니 사랑이가 방치되어 있었어요. 알고 보니 메주집 할머니 강아지인데 할머니가 몸이 편찮으셔서 요양보호사님이 밥만 겨우 챙겨주던 상황이었습니다. 할머니를 찾아가니 거동이 힘들어 관리가 불가능하다며 제발 데려가 달라고 통곡을 하셨습니다. 초5 때 손주가 데려와 지금 고2라니 7~8살 된 아이였어요. 오늘 다시 가니 겁먹고 집에서 안 나오길래 간식 주며 빗질로 긴장부터 풀어줬습니다. 근데 털을 만지는 순간 경악했습니다. 온몸에 피 빠는 진드기가 진짜 역대급으로 가득 차 있었어요... 맨손으로 온몸 샅샅이 뒤져서 세세하게 다 잡아주는데, 진짜 가장 안타까운 아이여서 저도 모르게 눈물이 흘렀습니다 ㅠㅠ 경계 풀고 안심시킨 뒤, 3m 와이어 줄 움직임에 맞춰 무성한 잡초들을 한참 동안 낫으로 다 베어내 줬습니다! 나무집이라 물청소 대신 구석구석 완벽하게 건식 청소 때려주고 야자매트에 그늘막 설치, 목초액 살균까지 완료! 깨끗하게 씻은 새 그릇에 영양제 가득 넣은 밥과 대자리까지 깔아줬습니다 ✨ 청소 끝날 때쯤 할머니와 보호사님이 오셨는데 바뀐 환경 보시고 대만족 하셨어요! 보호사님 밥 주러 오기 편하시라고 길목 잡초도 치우고, 지나가는 사람들에게 사랑이가 잘 보이도록 도로 시야도 확 틔워줬습니다. 산책 나가니 세상 순하고 예쁘게 잘 걷더라고요 ㅠㅠ [🎁 시고르 우체부의 특별한 입양 공약]촬영 내내 눈물이 날 만큼 마음이 아파서 사랑이에게 기적이 일어나길 바랄 뿐이었습니다. 털갈이가 심해 실내보단 좋은 마당이 있는 집에서 정성껏 키워주실 천사 같은 분을 찾습니다. 사랑이를 품어주신다면 저희 시고르 우체부가 직접 사랑이를 안전하게 모시고, 입양 가시는 집에 필요한 가득 찬 선물 세트까지 준비해 직접 배달 가겠습니다. 입양을 원하시는 분은 꼭 틱톡 DM으로 [거주 지역, 사육환경, 연락처]를 남겨주세요! 메시지 확인 후 연락드리겠습니다. 제발 기적이 일어나길 많은 공유 부탁드립니다 🥺 영상 보며 따뜻한 마음 보내주시는 모든 분들 정말 감사합니다! 답글을 다 달아드리진 못하지만, 남겨주시는 소중한 댓글은 하나하나 꼼꼼히 다 읽고 있습니다! 늘 죄송하고 감사해요 🥺 마지막으로 제 프로필에 올려둔 링크를 클릭하신 후 리스팅된 쿠팡 제품을 한 번 더 클릭하여, 꼭 해당 제품이 아니더라도 24시간 안에 아무 물품이나 구매해 주시면 쿠팡으로부터 일정 수수료를 지급받아 이 아이들에게 더 맛있는 다음 배달을 준비하는 데 큰 도움이 됩니다. 늘 감사합니다 ✨ #강아지 #애견 #반려견 #시고르자브종 #trending #viraltiktok

김치찜 어쩌면 마지막이 메인 아닐까요? 📖들어간 재료 -김치 반포기 -5겹살 600g정도(한덩이) -마늘 1숟가락 -고춧가루 1숟가락(색감용) -고추장 1/2숟가락 -간장 1숟가락(색감용) -콜라(500ml, 제로X)   ❗️제일 중요! (사이다도 괜찮아요!) -양파 반개 -대파 1줄 -설탕 1/2숟가락 (양파랑 콜라 넣어서 안넣어도 되는데 넣으면 더 감칠맛나요) 📚나름? 조리 순서 -오겹살 겉면을 찐한 갈색이 나올때까지 먼저 굽기 -아래에 고기기름이 자글자글할 때 김치 통으로 넣기 -김치 한번 뒤집어주고 김치 색깔이 조금 나면 콜라 다 넣기 -물도 500ml같이 넣어주고 끓기 시작하면 나머지 재료 투하 -30분 지나면 고기랑 김치 한번 뒤집어주고 30분 더 끓이기 (중간중간 물이 부족해서 탈 것 같으면 물 계속 추가해주기) -이후에 김치를 고기 위에 올려서 20분 끓이다가 마지막에 뚜껑열고 쫙 쫄여주기 이렇게 만들었어요! #김치찜 #통삼겹김치찜 #한식 #asmr #mukbang

This routine is for anyone who is not dealing with extreme damage but wants over all glossier & softer hair this is the the exact routine I built for getting glass hair on fine hair but will work for the wavy curly hair girls too!!  the science: the flatten your cuticle lies, the more light it reflects that's what gives the illusion of glass. glossy hair isn't a product, it's the consistency of routine over time that’s keeping that cuticle smooth from prewash to final styling  it took me a while to figure out the system, but once I did, the results compounded and now I wanna share my favourite tips with you because this is the routine that actually for every  wash day. the 5 things I never skip: 1. always create a barrier before shampoo: hair oil or conditioner first. less friction = less cuticle damage = more shine 2. weekly hair mask. deep hydration is what keeps that cuticle flat and the shine consistent. 3. a glossing treatment every 3-4 weeks  this is the step that takes glossy to glass  4. leave-in conditioner every single wash. beats frizz and keeps the cuticle flat between washes. 5. the hair sandwich method oil before heat styling AND after. then always finish with a cool shot to lock the cuticle in place ✨ Hope these haircare tips help you guys!! #hair #haircare #glasshair #hairgloss

the hair care routine that keeps my hair healthy ✨    all products linked on my shopmy which is linked in my bio    here’s the exact timeframe i follow each week: • i oil my hair 1–3x a week • i wash my hair based on oiliness, usually about every 2 days. i don’t follow a strict wash schedule • i use either a milk treatment, protein treatment, hair mask, or hair gloss about once a week #haircare #hairtok #healthyhair #hairroutine #hairtreatment

#92i #makeup Le “92i makeup” fait référence à un style de maquillage inspiré de l’univers du rap français, surtout lié à Booba et à son label 92i (“92 International”, en référence au département des Hauts-de-Seine). Sur les réseaux sociaux, ce terme désigne un maquillage au style urbain et confiant : teint très net, contouring marqué, regard intense avec eyeliner ou faux cils, lèvres bien dessinées et une attitude sûre de soi. Ce n’est pas une technique officielle de maquillage, mais plutôt une esthétique inspirée du luxe, de la street culture et d’une image forte et assumée.

Its all abt consistency!!🖤 But here's my routine💕 -wash my hair 3-4times a week.  -shampoo only focus on my scalp (not to my length).  -shampoo sles and non sls (like 2 times non sls and 1 time sles, its for balance my scalp n length) -always use conditioner in every hairwashday -hairmask 2times a week (after shampoo when ur scalp alrdy clean, on wet hair not dry) -always use heat protect (spray serum or cream) -also took some suplement d3 n zincplus -always trim my splits end every month for 1-2cm -always massage my scalp for 10min  -hair oiling 2-3times a week, im using rosemary based for hair growth. -scalp serum once a day.  -scrunchie and hair silk bonnet for sleep. -eat more protein and sleep enough. #hairtransformation #hairgrowth #longhair

As promised, this is my current scalp care routine! I previously didn’t think additional scalp care would do much for me, but the research behind the Pantene Abundant & Strong system (and all the research I’ve found on other scalp ingredients / products since) really changed my mind. Now I think about my scalp care routine as a proactive routine to keep my scalp + new hair growth in the healthiest state possible. This isn’t a routine that I think everyone *needs* to do, but for those who are also interested in promoting scalp health & improving hair retention, hopefully this gives you some steps to choose from that might help! Also- the results I’ve seen would only be from the scalp serums + shampoos alone because I haven’t been using the scalp device or red light helmet long enough to see any visible change yet. LMK if you want videos on my top recommendations for scalp serums + scalp focused shampoos next! Products Mentioned: 1. Pantene Abundant & Strong Serum 2. Neutrogena Hair Restore Serum  3. OGX Pro Growth + Peptide Shampoo 4. Dr Groot Scalp Revitalizing Hair Thickening Shampoo 5. DS Labs Scalp Activator - this was gifted with no obligation to review 6. Current Body Red Light Helmet - this was gifted with no obligation to review #scalpcare #hairroutine #haircareroutine #healthyhair
